source.author: SSA Catalog
source.notes: Creamy green herb sauce for shawarma wraps and bowls; bright, garlicky, and lemony.

ingredients.label: Plain Greek yogurt
notes: Use whole-milk for best body. Sub: plain yogurt (sauce will be thinner).

ingredients.label: Mayonnaise
notes: Optional but recommended for a richer, clingy sauce.

ingredients.label: Fresh mint leaves, packed
notes: Optional, but makes the sauce extra bright.

ingredients.label: Garlic, grated or pressed
notes: About 3–4 medium cloves; adjust to taste.

ingredients.label: Lemon zest
notes: About 1 tablespoon; optional but highly recommended.

ingredients.label: Olive oil
notes: Adds silkiness and helps emulsify the herbs into the sauce.

ingredients.label: Kosher salt
notes: Start with 1/2 tsp; adjust after resting.

ingredients.label: Jalapeño, seeded (optional)
notes: Adds gentle heat; omit for mild. Keep seeds for hotter.

ingredients.label: Water (as needed)
notes: Use only if needed to loosen consistency.

steps.title: Prep herbs
instructions: Rinse and thoroughly dry herbs (excess water can thin the sauce).
Roughly chop cilantro, parsley, and mint to help them blend evenly.

steps.title: Blend
instructions: Add yogurt, mayonnaise, cilantro, parsley, mint, green onion, garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, cumin, black pepper, salt, and optional jalapeño to a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth and bright green, scraping down sides as needed.

steps.title: Adjust texture and seasoning
instructions: If too thick, blend in water 1 teaspoon (5 ml) at a time until it reaches a drizzleable consistency.
Taste and adjust: more lemon for brightness, more salt for savor, more garlic for punch, or more herbs for a greener profile.

steps.title: Rest
instructions: Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes so flavors meld and garlic mellows.
Stir before serving (herb sauces can slightly separate).

steps.title: Store
instructions: Store in a sealed container in the refrigerator.
Best within 3–5 days for brightest color and flavor; usable up to 7 days if kept cold.
